claimText: The Samudrayaan Mission is a component of the Deep Ocean Mission aimed at exploring the ocean at a depth of 6,000 metres using a manned submersible vehicle named 'Matsya'.
evidenceExcerpt: Samudrayaan Mission A component of Deep Ocean Mission (DOM). Objective: Explore Ocean at 6,000-metre depth using manned submersible vehicle 'Matsya'.
examUse: Statement-based question on the objective and depth of the Samudrayaan Mission.

claimText: Matsya-6000, a deep-ocean human scientific submersible vehicle, is being developed by the National Institute of Ocean Technology (NIOT).
evidenceExcerpt: About Matsya-6000 4th Generation self-propelled deep-ocean human scientific submersible vehicle. Being developed by NIOT.
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question identifying the developing agency of Matsya-6000.

claimText: Matsya-6000 has an endurance of 12 hours under normal operation and 96 hours in case of an emergency.
evidenceExcerpt: Endurance of 12 hours under normal operation and 96 hours in case of emergency.
examUse: Statement-based question testing the technical specifications and endurance of Matsya-6000.
distractorHooks: Endurance of 24 hours under normal operation
Endurance of 48 hours in case of emergency
Unlimited endurance due to nuclear propulsion

claimText: The Ministry of Earth Sciences is the nodal ministry for the Deep Ocean Mission (DOM).
evidenceExcerpt: About DOM Nodal Ministry: Ministry of Earth Sciences
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the nodal ministry for the Deep Ocean Mission.
distractorHooks: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change

claimText: The components of the Deep Ocean Mission include deep sea mining, ocean climate change advisory, biodiversity exploration, and generating energy and freshwater from the ocean.
evidenceExcerpt: DOM components include deep sea mining, ocean climate change advisory, biodiversity exploration, and energy/freshwater from the ocean.
examUse: Multiple-statement question identifying the specific components and scope of the Deep Ocean Mission.
distractorHooks: Limited only to deep sea mining
